products.name: Cup of Blooms
products.description: Our signature! A cheerful paper cup filled with a petite bouquet — perfect for carrying home from the market.

products.name: Market Mini Bouquet
products.description: A sweet, hand-tied mini bouquet with the best of what's blooming this week.

products.description: A generous bunch of one variety — choose your flower at checkout. Price varies by variety.

products.name: Full Bouquet
products.description: A lush, hand-tied bouquet showcasing the best of the season. Perfect for gifting or treating yourself.
